title: Customers With No Low-Value Orders
description: Find customers who have never placed an order with amount less than 100.
sql_solution: SELECT DISTINCT customer_id FROM orders o WHERE NOT EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM orders WHERE customer_id = o.customer_id AND amount < 100);
pyspark_solution:
from pyspark.sql.functions import *

low_value_customers = orders.filter(col("amount") < 100).select("customer_id").distinct()

result = (
    orders.select("customer_id")
    .distinct()
    .join(low_value_customers, "customer_id", "left_anti")
)
